name: LocalAI
description: Registers a local LocalAI OpenAI-compatible server as a first-party chat provider using configured model IDs.

env.description: Optional fallback loopback LocalAI OpenAI-compatible base URL. Defaults to http://localhost:8080/v1.
Optional fallback bearer token for LocalAI when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.
Optional comma-separated LocalAI model IDs exposed by the local server when no model_ids Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: LocalAI base URL
settings.description: Loopback OpenAI-compatible base URL for LocalAI. Defaults to http://localhost:8080/v1 and is restricted by the plugin to localhost, 127.0.0.1, or ::1 /v1 URLs.

settings.label: LocalAI API token
settings.description: Optional bearer token for LocalAI. Falls back to LOCALAI_API_KEY.

settings.label: LocalAI model IDs
settings.description: Model IDs to expose for the local LocalAI server. Use IDs returned by LocalAI /v1/models or the configured model names. Falls back to comma-separated LOCALAI_MODEL_IDS.

providers.name: LocalAI
providers.description: Registers configured local LocalAI OpenAI-compatible chat models and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
